SMALLERMAP-DISABLE_IN_MULTIPLAYER.title: Disable In Multiplayer
Drawings wont line up if players have different map scales.
Default: true
SMALLERMAP-MAP_SCALE.title: Map Scale
SMALLERMAP-ICON_SCALE.title: Icon Scale
SMALLERMAP-ROOM_OFFSET_Y.title: Room Offset Y
SMALLERMAP-ROOM_OFFSET_Y.hover.desc:
Negative values shift all normal rooms upwards.
Default: -75
SMALLERMAP-BOSS_OFFSET_Y.title: Boss Offset Y
SMALLERMAP-BOSS_OFFSET_Y.hover.desc:
Negative values shift the boss upwards.
Default: 100
